_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Iterative design involves embedding the practice of iterative design and agile working in teams or wider organisation; leading on prototyping complex ideas at any fidelity; helping teams adapt quickly to changes in requirements, priorities or user needs; iterate delivery processes or team structures to help teams work effectively.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and executing applied research projects with clear organizational relevance, balancing research rigor with practical applicability.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-004 (LS, cosine: 0.358), LS-K-005 (LS, cosine: 0.348).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.461). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DDaT-only terms [adapt, agile, changes, complex, delivery, design] vs WIDAI-only terms [applicability, applied, balancing, clear, designing, executing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.836 (P=0.823, R=0.850). R exceeds P by 0.027 — the WIDAI KSA's 18 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 48 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (80.5%). The model interprets "Iterative design involves embedding the practice of iterative design and agile w" as logically implying aspects of "Skill in designing and executing applied research projects with clear organizati" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.428 ≈ STS 0.461 (gap 0.033). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.7%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DDaT terms: [adapt, agile, changes, complex, delivery, design]. WIDAI terms: [applicability, applied, balancing, clear, designing, executing].
